title: stelis gemmulosa
intro: Stelis gemmulosa, also known as the "Gem-encrusted Stelis," is a type of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stelis gemmulosa include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions like eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
